# CWE-368 vulnerable: Context Switching Race Condition (positive, pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-368-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"os/user"
)

var privilegedMode bool

func EnterPrivilegedMode(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) error {
	if r.Header.Get("X-Elevate") == "yes" {
		privilegedMode = true
	}
	if privilegedMode {
		return os.Setenv("MAINT_SHELL", "/bin/sh")
	}
	_, _ = user.Current()
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusForbidden)
	return nil
}
